recipient_access_code_id.description: Access code ID for AccessCode recipients

recipient_id.description: Legacy fallback recipient ID (mirrors recipient_access_code_id for owner/truck)

read_flag.description: Whether notification has been read / resolved

owner_read_at.description: Timestamp when a company owner marked a shared owner notification as read

owner_read_by_access_code_id.description: AccessCode ID of the company owner who marked a shared owner notification as read

owner_read_by_name.description: Display name of the company owner who marked a shared owner notification as read

notification_category.description: Category used to distinguish notification behaviors, such as dispatch_update_info

notification_type.description: General notification type, such as informational or confirmation

dispatch_status_key.description: Dedup key: '{dispatch_id}:{status}:{owner_id}' — used to prevent duplicate owner notifications for same dispatch+status+owner

required_trucks.description: Trucks that must confirm before this notification is resolved (owner notifications only)
